name: Pretrain-SkateFormer
displayDescription: Training and anomaly detection evaluation codebase for SkateFormer (ECCV 2024) and ST-GCN++ skeleton-based action recognition models. Needed for thesis research on behavior anomaly detection. Contains skeleton extraction pipelines (YOLO-Pose, HRNet), normalizing flow scorers, and multi-dataset benchmarking on ShanghaiTech/Avenue/UBnormal. Used by CV researchers. Built with Python, PyTorch.
